title: RECOVERY SERVICES - 211info
text: CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a team-based approach to provide individual and group therapy and other outpatient services to individuals living with substance abuse issues. Works with clients to achieve desired goals by teaching the skills necessary to regain stability in their lives and promote recovery. 115 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 325-5722 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 325-5722 Ask for an Engagement Specialist Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Contracted to serve people with Oregon Health Plan/Columbia Pacific CCO, Oregon Medicaid, and Moda insurance. DUII and mandated substance use disorder programs operate on a sliding scale based on income. Some programs have limited grant funding that does not rely on insurance payment. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CLATSOP COUNTY 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE
